mapper.select:
SELECT boardNo, memberUid, boardType, title, content, fileId, createdAt FROM board
ORDER BY boardNo DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT boardNo, memberUid, boardType, title, content, fileId, createdAt FROM board WHERE boardNo = #{boardNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (memberUid, boardType, title, content, fileId, createdAt) VALUES (#{memberUid}, #{boardType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{fileId}, NOW())
